questions.question: Does this creative feature a product?
questions.instruction: Answer yes if a product is visibly featured as a main element; otherwise no.

questions.question: Does this creative feature a person?
questions.instruction: Answer yes if any person is visibly present in the creative; otherwise no.

questions.question: Does this creative contain a call to action?
questions.instruction: Answer yes if there is explicit directive text like buy now, shop now, learn more, sign up.

questions.question: Is this creative out of focus?
questions.instruction: Answer yes only if the overall creative appears noticeably blurred or unfocused.

questions.question: Does this creative contain a brand logo?
questions.instruction: Answer yes only if there is a distinct branding element (symbol or stylised brand text) confined to a local area of the image. If brand text is large headline copy spanning multiple layout regions, treat it as overlay text, not a logo.

questions.question: Where in the image is the logo located?
questions.instruction: If no logo exists, answer no logo. Otherwise choose the single closest location label.

questions.question: Does this creative contain overlay text?
questions.instruction: Answer yes if text appears over the image as part of the creative design.

questions.question: Does this creative communicate urgency?
questions.instruction: Answer yes if wording or visuals imply urgency, scarcity, or immediate action.

questions.question: What is the primary colour scheme?
questions.instruction: Provide concise dominant colours as comma-separated lowercase names (e.g., white, blue, black).

questions.question: Does this creative contain a promotion or special deal?
questions.instruction: Answer yes if a discount, offer, sale, or special deal is explicitly present.
